details.quote: We also use other types of cookies. For example, our websites, email messages, and mobile apps may contain small transparent image files or lines of code that record how you interact with them.
details.what_is_tracked: Interaction with websites, email messages, and mobile apps

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: We are Booking.com and this privacy notice is intended for travelers using or considering using our products and services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This privacy notice describes how we collect and otherwise process your personal data when you visit our websites, use our mobile apps, or buy a travel-related product or service through us.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Booking.com B.V. | Oosterdokskade 163, 1011 DL Amsterdam, The Netherlands. | dataprotectionoffice@booking.com | Operates the platform and is the controller for the processing of personal data as described in this privacy notice, except where explicitly stated otherwise.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The contact details are the way to contact the Booking.com Data Protection Officer.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Personal data you give to us: When you make a trip reservation, we ask for your name and email address. Depending on the nature of the trip reservation, we may also ask for your home address, telephone number, payment information, date of birth, current location, whether you’re traveling for work purposes, the names and dates of birth of the people traveling with you, and any preferences you may indicate (such as dietary or accessibility requirements).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Purpose of personal data processing | Legal basis and comments |
|---|---|
| A. Trip reservations B. Customer service | Here Booking.com relies on the legal basis that the processing of personal data is necessary for the performance of a contract involving you, specifically to finalize and administer your trip reservation.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If the required personal data isn’t provided, Booking.com can’t finalize the trip reservation with the trip provider, nor can we provide customer service to you about it.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Generally, we keep your personal data for as long as is necessary to: - Enable you to use our services or to provide our services to you - Prevent and detect online fraud attempts and/or other illegal activities - Comply with legal obligations such as those from accounting and tax laws - Resolve any disputes and legal claims

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may share your personal data with third parties. These third parties include: The trip provider you booked with, Strategic partners, Connectivity providers, Third-party service providers, Other professional third parties, Competent authorities, Other business partners

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We do not currently use solely automated systems, including those using AI, to make a decision about you which would result in a legal or similarly significant effect on you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We combine people, processes, and technology to protect your personal data and respect your privacy. This includes, among other things, that we: - Maintain a comprehensive framework of security policies, procedures, and protocols - Employ personnel dedicated to cybersecurity and data protection - Use up-to-date security technologies such as encryption and data leakage prevention to help guard against unauthorized data disclosure or destruction

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Personal data and information about you we receive from other sources: We may also receive information about you from other sources. This may include one or more of the following: - Other BHI companies - Trip providers - Strategic partners - Other third-party companies such as marketing partners

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We receive personal data about you from these parties in situations such as these: - Our Strategic Partners. - Trip providers may share additional information with Booking.com. - We integrate with third-party payment service providers such as Adyen and Stripe. - Our platform includes communication services such as email and chat. - We may also receive information on an aggregated basis from our social media and marketing partners.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you aren’t satisfied with our response to your request or have other concerns about your personal data, you can also contact your data protection supervisory authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Correction | You can inform us anytime of changes to your personal data and ask us to correct certain personal data we hold about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Access | You can ask us for a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Erasure | You can ask us to erase the personal data we hold about you when, for example, it is no longer needed or we have asked for your consent and you later withdraw it.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Restriction | In certain situations, you can ask us to block or restrict the processing of the personal data we hold about you and object to particular ways we’re using your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Portability | In certain situations, you can also ask us to provide you with specific personal data you have given us for possible transmission to a third party.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Objection | Where we process your personal data based on legitimate interest or the public interest, you have the right to object to that use of your personal data anytime, subject to applicable law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Updated May 2026

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: Whenever you use our services, including our mobile apps, we may use cookies and other tracking technologies, which we collectively refer to as “cookies.” This section provides information about how we use cookies.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Booking.com B.V. | Oosterdokskade 163, 1011 DL Amsterdam, The Netherlands.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: Cookies we use can be divided into three purpose categories: functional, analytical, and marketing cookies.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: We work with selected third-party companies to collect and process data.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: | Functional cookies | We use functional cookies to enable our websites and mobile apps to work properly so you can create an account, sign in, and manage bookings. They also remember your selected currency, language, and past searches. These technical cookies must be enabled to use our website and services. |

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: A web browser cookie is a small text file placed by a website in the data that a web browser automatically stores on your computer or mobile device.

cookies.label: Distinction fonctionnels / publicitaires
cookies.quote: Cookies we use can be divided into three purpose categories: functional, analytical, and marketing cookies.

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We and our partners use analytical cookies to gain information on your website and mobile app usage, which is then used to understand how visitors like you use our platform and to improve the performance of our website and services.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: Where required, we offer you the option to decline analytical and marketing cookies (through, for example, a cookie banner).

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Booking.com is a business that connects travelers and partners around the world. The data that we collect from you, as described in this privacy notice, could be accessible from, transferred to, or stored in countries that may not have the same data protection laws as those of the country in which you initially provided the information.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
